title: Student Exchange Program Bio University of Missouri
content: Student Exchange Program University of Missouri (BTBI Dept.) JUIT – University of Missouri, USA (2022-23) One student of M.Sc. Biotechnology (DBT Sponsored) of Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, HP is selected under Students' Exchange Program and joined in the University of Missouri (February, 2023), USA. Saurabh Pandey
